title: gastrolobium spinosum f. angustum
intro: Gastrolobium spinosum f. angustum, also known as the narrow leaf bitter pea or narrow leaf poison, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues due to its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of nausea and diarrhea. In herbal preparations, Gastrolobium spinosum f. angustum can be used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
